text.title: A11y Annotation Pattern Library Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the per-component annotation schema and the dev-handoff doc shape.

forbidden.pattern: annotation with archetype == "custom_disclosed" and no rationale field explaining why APG archetype doesn't fit
annotation missing one of the 3 minimums: aria_role_or_element, accessible_name, states
accessible_name sourced from placeholder text only (placeholder is not a label)
tab_order_position omitted on screens with > 3 interactive elements
keyboard_map containing invented keys ("Ctrl+M to open menu") without disclosure to screen-reader users

allowed-transformations.transformation: "custom_disclosed" archetype is allowed when no APG pattern fits; must include rationale + a "discoverability" note (visible help text or onboarding for the custom shortcut).
Decorative-only icon components may be marked archetype="decorative" with aria-hidden="true" and skip role/name; explicit waiver, not silent omission.
For composite widgets, child annotations may inherit the parent's tab_order_position with a sub-index (e.g., "5.1", "5.2").

list.item: every interactive layer has an annotation (coverage 100%)
every annotation lists archetype + role/element + name + states + keyboard
tab order numbered on screens with > 3 interactive elements
